name: qp_enum_1000
drl:
rule "R0"
when
    $d : T2($v : f0)
then
    insert(new T1($v, true));
end
query Q0(boolean $qa0_0, String $qa0_1, boolean $qa0_2)
    ( $qp0_0 : T1(f1 == $qa0_0, f0 == $qa0_1) )
    or
    ( $qp0_1 : T1(f1 == $qa0_2, $qb0_0 : f1, $qb0_1 : f1) and $qp0_2 : T1(f0 == $qa0_1, f1 != true, $qb0_2 : f0, $qb0_3 : f1) )
end
query TCr(String $a, String $b)
    RelR($a, $b;)
end

rule QR0 salience 7
when
    T0(f1 >= "beta", $qr0_b0 : f2)
    ?Q0(true, $qr0_x0, false;)
    T1(f0 == $qr0_x0)
then
    insert(new QOut(1, $qr0_b0, $qr0_b0, "", true));
end
